arts.ttl: Man City 'open to £15m bids' for club legend amid Saudi Arabia contract reveal
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly willing to sell long-serving right-back Kyle Walker if they receive an offer of around £15m next year.

arts.ttl: Wolves vs Manchester City – Match Preview and Team News
arts.sum: Manchester City travel to the Midlands this weekend to face a dispirited Wolverhampton Wanderers side at Molineux. Pep Guardiola’s team remain unbeaten this season and they will hope to pile the pressure on league leaders Liverpool ahead of their game later on Sunday. arts.ttl: Wolves vs Man City: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Gary O'Neil's high point in the Molineux dugout arrived in this fixture last season as the former midfielder masterminded a 2-1 victory over a Rodri-less City. Manchester City are back in Premier League action on Sunday afternoon as they travel to bottom-of-the-table Wolves.

arts.ttl: Man City star becomes 'key £20million target for Saudi Arabian side Al-Ahli' and champions 'would let him go' due to one key factor
arts.sum: Al-Ahli want to make him their fifth former Premier League star and have prioritised his pursuit. The City stalwart would be available for around £20million.
